name: graphql-suite
description: Auto-generated GraphQL CRUD, type-safe clients, and React Query hooks from Drizzle PostgreSQL schemas
author: https://github.com/dmythro

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@graphql-suite/schema' build && bun run --filter '@graphql-suite/client' build && bun run --filter '@graphql-suite/query' build
scripts.check: bun run check-types && bun run lint:check && bun run test
scripts.ci: bun run check-types && bun run lint:check && bun run test
scripts.publish-all: npm publish packages/schema/dist && npm publish packages/client/dist && npm publish packages/query/dist && npm publish dist/@drizzle-graphql-suite/schema && npm publish dist/@drizzle-graphql-suite/client && npm publish dist/@drizzle-graphql-suite/query && npm publish dist/graphql-suite && npm publish dist/drizzle-graphql-suite
scripts.publish-new: npm publish packages/schema/dist && npm publish packages/client/dist && npm publish packages/query/dist && npm publish dist/graphql-suite
scripts.release: bun run build && bun run prepare-publish
